nasb.text: While He was still speaking to the crowds, behold, His mother and brothers were standing outside, seeking to speak to Him.

esv.text: While he was still speaking to the people, behold, his mother and his brothers stood outside, asking to speak to him.

cnv.text: 耶穌還在對群眾講話的時候，他的母親和弟弟站在外面，要找他講話。

ccb.text: 耶稣还在和众人说话的时候，祂的母亲和兄弟站在外面，想要跟祂说话。

csbs.text: 耶稣正在向人群讲话，这时候他的母亲和弟弟们站在外面，想要和他说话。
